entry.title: [WIP] — Political Self-Dissolution: Tendencies in Referendal Electoralism from America to Armenia
entry.summary: On the emergence of referendal electoralism in the United States and Armenia, and the potential for self-dissolution of political parties.
entry.content:
A work-in-progress note on Armenia’s “I Am Against Everyone” movement and a historical echo in Lawrence Lessig’s 2015 “referendum”-style presidential run.

Open the full post for images, embeds, and the complete layout.
